words.hint: Pewnego ranka Tomek wstał bardzo wcześnie.
words.answer: One morning, Tomek woke up very early.
The sun was shining outside the window.
Tomek ate a quick breakfast.

words.hint: Postanowił pójść na spacer do lasu.
words.answer: He decided to take a walk in the forest.
He put on his sports shoes and a jacket.

words.hint: Na ścieżce spotkał swojego przyjaciela Marka.
words.answer: On the path, he met his friend Marek.
Together, they decided to look for small animals.
Soon, they saw a squirrel in a tree.
The squirrel was holding a nut in its paws.
The boys smiled at each other.

words.hint: Szli dalej ścieżką, rozmawiając o szkole.
words.answer: They walked further, talking about school.

words.hint: Marek opowiedział o nowym nauczycielu matematyki.
words.answer: Marek told a story about the new math teacher.

words.hint: Tomek powiedział, że lubi lekcje matematyki.
words.answer: Tomek said he likes math lessons.

words.hint: W pewnej chwili usłyszeli szelest liści.
words.answer: Suddenly, they heard the rustling of leaves.
A little hare jumped out from the bushes.
The boys were delighted by the sight.
Marek took a photo of the hare with his phone.
They continued walking deeper into the forest.
The forest was quiet and peaceful.

words.hint: Na chwilę usiedli na pniu drzewa.
words.answer: They sat for a while on a tree stump.

words.hint: Zjedli kanapki, które mieli w plecakach.
words.answer: They ate the sandwiches they had in their backpacks.
They drank water from their bottles.
Suddenly, a light rain started to fall.

words.hint: Chłopcy schowali się pod wielkim drzewem.
words.answer: The boys hid under a big tree.
The rain quickly stopped.
A rainbow appeared in the sky.
Tomek was very happy.
The boys returned to the path.
They noticed strange tracks on the ground.
They decided to follow them.
The tracks led to an old hut.
The hut looked abandoned.
The boys peeked through the window.
There was no one inside.
Suddenly, they heard a soft voice.

words.hint: To był starszy pan, właściciel chatki.
words.answer: It was an elderly man, the owner of the hut.
He invited the boys inside.

words.hint: Opowiedział im o zwierzętach żyjących w lesie.
words.answer: He told them about the animals living in the forest.
He showed them his collection of cones and leaves.
The boys were very curious.
The elderly man treated them to tea.
They told each other interesting stories.
After an hour, the boys had to go back.
They thanked him for his hospitality.

words.hint: Wyszli z chatki i wrócili na ścieżkę.
words.answer: They left the hut and returned to the path.
They walked slowly towards home.
They talked about the adventure they had experienced.

words.hint: Tomek był szczęśliwy, że wyszedł z domu.
words.answer: Tomek was glad he had left the house.

words.hint: Marek zaproponował kolejną wycieczkę za tydzień.
words.answer: Marek suggested another trip next week.
The boys agreed.
They finally reached the town.
They parted at the market square.
Tomek went to his apartment.

words.hint: W domu opowiedział rodzicom o przygodzie.
words.answer: At home, he told his parents about the adventure.
His parents were proud of him.
Tomek was tired but happy.

words.hint: Położył się na łóżku i zamknął oczy.
words.answer: He lay down on the bed and closed his eyes.

words.hint: Myślał o tym, co zobaczył w lesie.
words.answer: He thought about what he had seen in the forest.
He imagined meeting a fox.
He heard birds singing in his imagination.
It was a very successful day.
Tomek fell asleep peacefully.

words.hint: Przyśnił mu się zając z lasu.
words.answer: He dreamt of the hare from the forest.

words.hint: W jego śnie zając mówił ludzkim głosem.
words.answer: In his dream, the hare spoke with a human voice.
He suggested a new adventure to Tomek.
Tomek agreed without hesitation.
He woke up in the morning with a smile.

words.hint: Był gotowy na kolejny dzień pełen przygód.
words.answer: He was ready for another day full of adventures.
